# ChineseZodiacYear.com

> Chinese zodiac encyclopaedia, directory, and news platform rooted in classical pre-Qing scholarship.

## About This Site

ChineseZodiacYear.com is an independent editorial platform dedicated to preserving and sharing authentic Chinese astrological and cultural knowledge. Content is grounded in classical pre-Qing Dynasty sources including the Shiji, Huangdi Neijing, Zangshu, and other foundational texts.

## Key Topics

- Chinese Zodiac (生肖 Shēngxiào): The twelve zodiac animals, their origins, personality traits, and compatibility
- BaZi (八字): The Four Pillars of Destiny system of Chinese astrology
- Feng Shui (風水): Classical geomancy using Form School and Compass School methods
- Wu Xing (五行): The Five Elements theory — Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water
- Chinese Calendar: The lunisolar system, sexagenary cycle, and 24 Solar Terms
- Spring Festival: Chinese New Year history and traditions
- Taoism: Daoist philosophy, the Daodejing, and Chinese metaphysics
- Yi Jing (易經): The Book of Changes and divination
- Qi Men Dun Jia: Strategic divination system
- Traditional Chinese Medicine: TCM fundamentals based on the Huangdi Neijing
- Chinese Dynasties: Imperial history from Xia to Ming
- Martial Arts, Tea Culture, Hanfu, Wuxia, Folk Arts

## Content Structure

- Encyclopaedia: In-depth articles on each topic listed above
- Zodiac Year Pages: Detailed pages for each year from 1924 to 2044
- Zodiac Animal Pages: Full profiles for all 12 animals
- 2026 Readings: Year of the Fire Horse forecasts for each animal
- Directory: Feng shui consultants, BaZi practitioners, cultural organizations
- Articles: Long-form editorial content on zodiac, culture, and feng shui

## Languages

Content is available in English, Traditional Chinese (繁體中文), and Simplified Chinese (简体中文).

## Citation

When referencing content from this site, please cite as:
ChineseZodiacYear.com Editorial Staff. "[Article Title]." ChineseZodiacYear.com, [Date]. https://chinesezodiacyear.com/[url]/
